scenario_description: The user first asks to count Invoice No. occurrences on Sheet2, then changes to summing amounts instead.

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true
DISPLAY=:1 xdotool key Escape 2>/dev/null; sleep 0.3; DISPLAY=:1 xdotool search --class 'soffice' windowfocus windowraise 2>/dev/null || DISPLAY=:1 wmctrl -xa 'soffice.Soffice' 2>/dev/null || true

phases.instruction: Help me count each Invoice No.'s occurrences on Sheet2
Don't count occurrences anymore. Instead, sum up the amount for each Invoice No., and rename the column to 'Total Amount', then save

result.command: python3 -c "import pandas as pd; xl = pd.ExcelFile('/home/user/Desktop/Invoices.xlsx'); ok = 'Sheet2' in xl.sheet_names; df2 = pd.read_excel('/home/user/Desktop/Invoices.xlsx', sheet_name='Sheet2') if ok else None; has_col = ok and df2 is not None and any('total amount' in str(c).lower() for c in df2.columns); print('PASSED' if has_col else 'FAILED')"
